name: semitexa/platform-ui
description: Semitexa Platform UI — LLM-friendly CSS grammar, design tokens, primitive components, and AI-assisted skin generation (SkinResolver: LLM prompt resolver feeding semitexa/theme's skin generator, plus refinement and eval scorer). Requires semitexa/theme for SkinAlgorithm contract.

semitexa-module.name: platform-ui
semitexa-module.description: LLM-friendly CSS grammar + design tokens + UI primitives + AI-assisted skin generation (SkinResolver → theme)
